ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., LeNet, AlexNet, VGGNet, GoogleNet) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* The deep learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the model is publicly accessible */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "original_size" REAL /* Original size of the model in MB */,
  "compressed_size" REAL /* Compressed size of the model in MB */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio (original size / compressed size) */,
  "compression_time" TEXT /* Time taken for the compression process */,
  "compression_algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the compression algorithm used */,
  "is_lossy" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the compression is lossy or lossless */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "original_accuracy" REAL /* Original accuracy of the model */,
  "compressed_accuracy" REAL /* Compressed accuracy of the model */,
  "inference_time_original" TEXT /* Inference time of the original model */,
  "inference_time_compressed" TEXT /* Inference time of the compressed model */,
  "memory_usage_original" REAL /* Memory usage of the original model */,
  "memory_usage_compressed" REAL /* Memory usage of the compressed model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the compression algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compression algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the compression algorithm */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the algorithm is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_compression" (
  "compression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being compressed */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression algorithm used */,
  "compression_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was compressed */,
  "compression_status" TEXT /* Status of the compression process (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "compression_log" TEXT /* Log of the compression process for troubleshooting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_compression_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES compression_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_compression_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
